marvel.name: Marvel Comics
marvel.description: American publisher founded in 1939, one of the largest and most influential in the comic book industry.

dc.name: DC Comics
dc.description: American publisher founded in 1934, one of the two largest superhero comic publishers, creator of Superman, Batman, and Wonder Woman.

image-comics.name: Image Comics
image-comics.description: American publisher founded in 1992 by a group of artists who left Marvel Comics, known for letting creators retain the copyright to their work.

bonelli.name: Sergio Bonelli Editore
bonelli.description: Italian publisher founded in 1940, a reference in western and adventure comics in Italy, publisher of Tex.
